name: Challenger Sale Principles
summary: The best sellers do not just build relationships — they teach, tailor, and take control. Challenge your prospect's thinking to win.
whenToUseIt: When selling a new category, a complex solution, or when the prospect does not yet understand the full scope of their problem.
steps: Teach — Share an insight the prospect did not know. Reframe their problem.
Tailor — Connect your insight to their specific business situation and metrics.
Take Control — Guide the conversation confidently. Do not just respond to their questions — shape the discussion.
example: Instead of asking 'What are your challenges?', a challenger seller says: 'Most companies your size lose 15-20% of revenue to [specific problem] without realising it. Here is why — and here is what the best companies do differently.' This positions you as an expert, not a vendor.
